Docs.summary: Holds configuration customizations for IPVS. May only be specified if 'mode' is set to 'IPVS'.

MemberSignature.Value: public int? TcpFinTimeoutInSeconds { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<int32> TcpFinTimeoutInSeconds
Public Property TcpFinTimeoutInSeconds As Nullable(Of Integer)
member this.TcpFinTimeoutInSeconds : Nullable<int> with get, set

Docs.summary: The timeout value used for IPVS TCP sessions after receiving a FIN in seconds. Must be a positive integer value.

Public Property TcpTimeoutInSeconds As Nullable(Of Integer)
member this.TcpTimeoutInSeconds : Nullable<int> with get, set

Docs.summary: The timeout value used for idle IPVS TCP sessions in seconds. Must be a positive integer value.

Docs.summary: The timeout value used for IPVS UDP packets in seconds. Must be a positive integer value.
